honestBound: Self-authored probes over the live corpus; exact-match scorer (no LLM judge). nDCG IDCG is POOLED (ideal = best gain ordering any backend surfaced), so metrics validate the ranking deltas + the harness, not a third-party headline. hybrid_dedup = hybrid + near-duplicate collapse (ablation). All backends search the SAME committed index.
